description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian figure with arms extended horizontally, as if in a T-pose. She is wearing a knee-length, sleeveless dress with a fitted bodice and a flared skirt, which gives a sense of movement to the garment. Her footwear consists of heeled shoes with ankle straps, and her legs are bare. The figure's hair is medium-length and straight, falling just past the shoulders. The overall build is slender, and the proportions are realistic, with visible articulation at the shoulders, elbows, and knees. The surface of the figure is smooth, with subtle detailing on the dress and shoes.
description: A slender adult female figure in a sleeveless, knee-length dress and heeled shoes, arms extended in a T-pose, with medium-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, bodice of the dress, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the dress, and the heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the dress's back, and the backs of the legs and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figure, the right arm, and the side of the dress and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless knee-length dress with a flared skirt
